dialogueChunks.intro: A traveler passing through brought word of something strange {location_hint}. Ancient stones with carvings no one can read, arranged in patterns that don't match any known builders.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: I've asked around and {quest_ally} confirmed similar markings were spotted near {location} months ago. Whatever civilization left these behind, they were deliberate about placement. The {enemy_type} seem drawn to those sites too, which worries me.
dialogueChunks.outro: Someone needs to examine {quest_focus} up close and bring back anything that might explain their purpose. Are you curious enough to go, {player_name}?

playerResponses.text: Mysteries like this are worth pursuing.
I'll investigate, but I want answers too.

dialogueChunks.intro: The wildlife around {location_hint} has been behaving strangely. Birds refuse to fly over a certain area. Animals that wander in don't come back.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} ventured to the edge of {quest_focus} and returned pale and shaking. They said the ground felt wrong underfoot: warm where it should be cold, silent where there should be insects. Even the {enemy_type} avoid it.
dialogueChunks.outro: Something unnatural is happening out there, {player_name}. We need someone to get close enough to understand what's causing it before the dead zone reaches our walls.

playerResponses.text: I'll find out what's killing the land.
How far has it spread so far?
Nature sorts itself out. I'll pass.

dialogueChunks.intro: Miners digging near {location_hint} broke through into something they weren't expecting: a chamber made of materials no one recognizes. They sealed the entrance and came here.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The miners swear the walls were warm to the touch and humming. {target_npc} thinks it could be a vault, a tomb, or something else entirely. The {enemy_type} have been more active in that area since the breach.
dialogueChunks.outro: {quest_focus} needs someone who can handle surprises. The miners won't go back down. Will you, {player_name}?

playerResponses.text: A sealed chamber? I have to see it.
What if it was sealed for a reason?
Sounds like it should stay sealed.
